Streamplay Studio Limited has announced the issuance of 100,000,000 unlisted options, exercisable at $0.015 each and expiring three years from the date of issue. Circassia Pharmaceuticals ( (GB:NIOX) ) has shared an update.

NIOX Group plc has published the notice for its 2026 Annual General Meeting, confirming that the AGM will take place on 21 May 2026 at the company’s registered office in Oxford. The notice and the 2025 Annual Report and Accounts are now available on the company’s investor website, with hard copies dispatched to shareholders who requested them.

The announcement provides logistical details for investors, including the requirement for shareholders wishing to attend the AGM in person to register their intention by a specified deadline. This scheduling and documentation update signals the formal start of NIOX’s annual governance cycle, giving shareholders an opportunity to review performance and engage with the board on strategy and oversight matters.

Sanyo Denki Co., Ltd. ( (JP:6516) ) has shared an update.

Sanyo Denki has disclosed that it received a shareholder proposal ahead of its 124th Ordinary General Meeting of Shareholders scheduled for June 2026, submitted by Intertrust Trustees (Cayman) Limited in its capacity as trustee of JAPAN‑UP and by Strategic Capital, Inc. The board plans to carefully review the proposal, which calls for electing one director and amending the Articles of Incorporation on directors’ terms of office, capital policy review, stock splits, and the total number of authorized shares, signaling potential changes to governance and capital structure that could affect shareholder rights and the company’s capital management strategy.

Sanyo Denki Co., Ltd., listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market under code 6516, operates in the electrical and electronics sector, focusing on industrial and electronic equipment components such as cooling systems, power systems, and servo systems. The company serves a broad industrial customer base that relies on high‑reliability components for factory automation, information technology, and infrastructure applications.

data.title: African Gold Director Sells Direct Stake but Retains Large Indirect Holding
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from African Gold Ltd. ( (AU:A1G) ).

African Gold Ltd. has reported a change in the holdings of director Mathew O’Hara, who sold his directly held stake of 42,004 ordinary shares in an on-market transaction at $1.025 per share. Following the sale, O’Hara retains a substantial indirect interest through the O’Hara Investment Trust, which still holds over 7 million ordinary shares and 5 million options, indicating that his overall economic exposure to the company remains significant despite the disposal of his personal shareholding.

The transaction, which did not occur during a closed trading period, suggests routine portfolio or personal financial management rather than a complete exit from the stock, given O’Hara’s continuing position via the trust and options. For investors, the notice clarifies that while the director has reduced his directly held shares to zero, his aligned interests with other shareholders persist through his large indirect holdings, limiting the potential governance or confidence impact that might arise from a full divestment.

More about African Gold Ltd.

African Gold Ltd. is an Australia-listed mining company focused on the exploration and development of gold assets. The company is part of the broader resources sector and its securities are traded on the ASX, where it is subject to ongoing disclosure requirements, including reporting changes in directors’ interests.

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

Elica S.p.A. ( (IT:ELC) ) has issued an update.

Elica is using EuroCucina 2026 at Milan’s Salone del Mobile to showcase its evolution into a full cooking specialist, unveiling its first range of induction hobs built on proprietary ID Technology and the new Matrix user interface. Developed through a €2 million, three-year R&D effort, this in-house hardware and software platform is designed to give Elica greater control over innovation, strengthen its competitive positioning and support a scalable pipeline of future products.

The new hobs promise a more flexible, ergonomic and quiet cooking experience, with precise temperature-based control, automatic modes and a high-definition pixel-matrix display that enables intuitive graphics, animations and messages. Alongside these launches, Elica presents upgrades to its flagship Lhov all‑in‑one cooking system and advanced lighting solution Luna, reinforcing a premium, design‑driven vision of the kitchen as an open, borderless environment that blends creativity, technology and smart connectivity.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:ELC) stock is a Hold with a EUR1.70 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Elica S.p.A. stock, see the IT:ELC Stock Forecast page.

Elica S.p.A. is an Italian company operating in the cooking and kitchen appliances industry, known for its design-led range hoods and integrated cooking solutions. data.title: Nanjing Leads Biolabs Starts Phase II Trial of Opamtistomig in Gastric Cancer
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Nanjing Leads Biolabs Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:9887) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Nanjing Leads Biolabs has begun a Phase II, open-label, multi-center clinical trial in China for its bispecific antibody Opamtistomig (LBL-024), enrolling the first patient with first-line locally advanced or metastatic gastric or gastroesophageal junction adenocarcinoma. Led by Beijing Cancer Hospital’s Professor Shen Lin, the study will assess the efficacy and safety of LBL-024 in this hard-to-treat population amid high gastric cancer incidence and poor survival rates in China.

LBL-024 simultaneously targets PD-L1 and 4-1BB to relieve immunosuppression and enhance T-cell activation, and it has already reached registrational stage globally for extrapulmonary neuroendocrine carcinoma with encouraging efficacy and safety data in multiple tumor types. The drug has secured multiple regulatory designations in China, the U.S. and Europe, underscoring its potential to become a first- or best-in-class broad-spectrum cancer therapy and to strengthen the company’s position in the competitive immuno-oncology field, though successful development and commercialization remain uncertain.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:9887) stock is a Buy with a HK$100.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Nanjing Leads Biolabs Co., Ltd. Class H stock, see the HK:9887 Stock Forecast page.

More about Nanjing Leads Biolabs Co., Ltd. Class H

Nanjing Leads Biolabs Co., Ltd. is a China-based biopharmaceutical company focused on developing innovative oncology therapies, including bispecific antibodies targeting immune checkpoints and T-cell activation pathways. Its pipeline targets multiple solid tumors and high unmet medical-need indications, with an emphasis on achieving first-in-class or best-in-class status in areas such as extrapulmonary neuroendocrine carcinoma and lung cancers.

Average Trading Volume: 827,049

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$18.69B

Find detailed analytics on 9887 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Spheria Emerging Cos. Ltd. ( (AU:SEC) ) has issued an announcement.

Spheria Emerging Companies Limited has reported an estimated pre-tax net tangible asset backing of $2.325 per share as at 20 April 2026, based on the daily value of its investment portfolio and cash balances, adjusted for fees, operating costs, and taxes. The figure, which is unaudited and approximate, is stated before the 1.1 cent per share dividend payable on 30 April 2026, with the ex-dividend date of 23 April 2026, giving investors an updated indication of portfolio value ahead of the upcoming payout.

By specifying that the NTA excludes tax on unrealised gains and certain deferred tax assets, the company provides clarity on how its asset base is measured and how this might differ from after-tax valuations. This update helps shareholders and potential investors assess the underlying value of the fund’s holdings relative to its market price and informs capital allocation and trading decisions around the dividend timeline.

More about Spheria Emerging Cos. Ltd.

Spheria Emerging Companies Limited is an Australian listed investment company focused on a portfolio of emerging companies, with its shares traded on the ASX under the ticker SEC. The company invests in a diversified selection of smaller-cap businesses and manages its assets to deliver capital growth and income for shareholders through active portfolio management.

data.title: Long Investment Corp Details Financial Profiles of Nasdaq Targets in Share Purchase Deals
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from China Financial Leasing Group Ltd ( (HK:2312) ) is now available.

Long Investment Corp has released supplemental details on its previously announced share purchase transactions, clarifying the financial profiles of two Nasdaq-listed targets, Metalpha Technology Holding Limited and NIP Group Inc. By using consideration shares under its general mandate to acquire stakes in these entities, the company is pursuing an asset-backed growth strategy that increases its exposure to technology and digital-asset‑related businesses while conserving cash.

Metalpha reported a turnaround to a net profit of about USD 15.9 million and a significant increase in net assets to roughly USD 36.6 million for the year ended 31 March 2025, which may offer Long Investment Corp access to a fast-improving earnings profile. NIP Group remained loss-making in 2024 but held substantial net assets of over USD 242 million, suggesting Long Investment Corp is targeting a mix of growth potential and balance-sheet strength despite near-term losses, a strategy with implications for its risk profile and returns to shareholders.

More about China Financial Leasing Group Ltd

Long Investment Corp is a Hong Kong-listed company that undertakes share purchase transactions funded through share issuances under its general mandate. The firm invests in listed entities, including technology and digital-asset-related companies, using equity as consideration to build strategic stakes in overseas capital markets such as Nasdaq.

Average Trading Volume: 668,341

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell
